title: Escape "<" and ">" in attributes when serializing HTML · Issue #6235 · whatwg/html
image_alt: I'm submitting this issue after a short discussion on Twitter with @zcorpan today. I think we should change the rules of escaping a string in attribute mode, and also escape < and > to < and &gt...
